qualifier: [Petyr's kingdom was put down by Arlan III's conquest]
evidence_snippet: Lord Petyr had a brief, inglorious reign before being put down.

qualifier: [brief reign as river king / King of the Trident]
evidence_snippet: Petyr claimed the title of river king or King of the Trident in the generations after the riverlands were conquered by the Storm King Arlan III Durrandon.
